template.name: Feature Section
template.bodyText: Manage your projects effortlessly with powerful tools designed for modern teams.

fields.name: headingText
fields.label: Heading Text
fields.description: Section heading displayed as h2 (bold, ~40px, dark)

fields.name: bodyText
fields.label: Body Description
fields.description: Supporting body text below the heading (18px, dark grey)

fields.name: ctaLabel
fields.label: CTA Button Label
fields.description: Text label for the call-to-action button

fields.name: ctaUrl
fields.label: CTA Button URL
fields.description: Link destination for the CTA button

fields.name: mediaSrc
fields.label: Media Image
fields.description: Image or graphic displayed in the media column (~540x380px recommended)
